mapper.select:
/* OrderMapper.getAdminOrderList: 관리자 주문 목록 조회 */ SELECT OD.ORD_NO , OD.ORD_DTL_NO , DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ORDER_DT , OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('ORD_DTL_STAT', OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD) AS ORD_DTL_STAT_NM , OD.GOODS_ID , OD.SIZE_ID , OD.SUPPLY_AMT * OD.ORD_QTY AS SUPPLY_AMT , ((OD.SALE_AMT + OD.ADD_AMT) * OD.ORD_QTY) AS SALE_AMT , GREATEST( ((OD.SALE_AMT + OD.ADD_AMT) * OD.ORD_QTY) - OD.GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT - OD.CART_CPN_DC_AMT - OD.POINT_USE_AMT, 0 ) AS FINAL_PAY_AMT , OD.GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT AS GOODS_COUPON_DISCOUNT_AMT , OD.CART_CPN_DC_AMT AS CART_COUPON_DISCOUNT_AMT , OD.POINT_USE_AMT AS POINT_USE_AMT , COALESCE(OB.ORD_DELV_AMT, 0) AS DELIVERY_FEE_AMT FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = OD.ORD_NO
ORDER BY COALESCE(OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT) DESC, OD.ORD_NO DESC, OD.ORD_DTL_NO ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
/* OrderMapper.getAdminOrderCount: 관리자 주문 목록 조회 수 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = OD.ORD_NO

/* OrderMapper.getAdminOrderStartDeliveryList: 관리자 배송 시작 관리 목록 조회 */ SELECT OD.ORD_NO , OD.ORD_DTL_NO , COALESCE(GB.GOODS_NM, '') AS GOODS_NM , OD.GOODS_ID , OD.SIZE_ID , OD.DELV_COMP_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('DELV_COMP', OD.DELV_COMP_CD) AS DELV_COMP_NM , OD.INVOICE_NO , DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(OB.ORDER_CONFIRM_DT, OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS PAY_DT , OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('ORD_DTL_STAT', OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD) AS ORD_DTL_STAT_NM FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = OD.ORD_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = OD.GOODS_ID
ORDER BY COALESCE(OB.ORDER_CONFIRM_DT, OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT) DESC, OD.ORD_NO DESC, OD.ORD_DTL_NO ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* OrderMapper.getAdminOrderStartDeliveryCount: 관리자 배송 시작 관리 목록 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = OD.ORD_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = OD.GOODS_ID

/* OrderMapper.getShopMypageOrderGroup: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 주문상세 주문번호 1건 조회 */ SELECT OB.ORD_NO , DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ORDER_DT FROM ORDER_BASE OB WHERE OB.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND OB.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND OB.ORD_STAT_CD != 'ORD_STAT_00' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD WHERE OD.ORD_NO = OB.ORD_NO AND OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD != 'ORD_DTL_STAT_00' ) LIMIT 1

/* OrderMapper.getShopMypageOrderCancelReasonList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 주문취소 사유 코드 목록 조회 */ SELECT CD , CD_NM FROM COMMON_CODE WHERE GRP_CD = 'CHG_REASON' AND CD LIKE 'C_%' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, CD ASC

/* OrderMapper.getShopMypageOrderReturnReasonList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 반품 사유 코드 목록 조회 */ SELECT CD , CD_NM FROM COMMON_CODE WHERE GRP_CD = 'CHG_REASON' AND CD LIKE 'R_%' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, CD ASC

/* OrderMapper.getShopMypageOrderReturnFeeContext: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 반품 배송비 계산 이력 컨텍스트 조회 */ SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB JOIN ORDER_CHANGE_DETAIL OCD ON OCD.CLM_NO = OCB.CLM_NO AND OCD.ORD_NO = OCB.ORD_NO WHERE OCB.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND OCB.CHG_GB_CD IN ('R', 'E') AND COALESCE(OCB.CHG_STAT_CD, '') != 'CHG_STAT_02' AND ( (OCB.CHG_GB_CD = 'R' AND COALESCE(OCD.CHG_REASON_CD, '') LIKE 'R_2%') OR (OCB.CHG_GB_CD = 'E' AND COALESCE(OCD.CHG_REASON_CD, '') LIKE 'E_2%') ) ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS HAS_PRIOR_COMPANY_FAULT_RETURN_OR_EXCHANGE , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB JOIN ORDER_CHANGE_DETAIL OCD ON OCD.CLM_NO = OCB.CLM_NO AND OCD.ORD_NO = OCB.ORD_NO WHERE OCB.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND OCB.CHG_GB_CD = 'R' AND COALESCE(OCB.CHG_STAT_CD, '') != 'CHG_STAT_02' AND COALESCE(OCB.PAY_DELV_AMT, 0) < 0 AND COALESCE(OCD.CHG_REASON_CD, '') LIKE 'R_1%' ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS HAS_PRIOR_CUSTOMER_FAULT_RETURN_DEDUCTION FROM DUAL

/* OrderMapper.getShopMypageOrderStatusSummary: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 주문내역 상태 요약 건수 조회 */ SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS WAITING_FOR_DEPOSIT_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PAYMENT_COMPLETED_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PRODUCT_PREPARING_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DELIVERY_PREPARING_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_05' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SHIPPING_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_06' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DELIVERY_COMPLETED_COUNT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_07' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PURCHASE_CONFIRMED_COUNT FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = OD.ORD_NO WHERE OB.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND OB.ORD_STAT_CD != 'ORD_STAT_00' AND COALESCE(OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT) >= #{startDateTime} AND COALESCE(OB.ORDER_DT, OB.REG_DT) < #{endExclusiveDateTime} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ORDER_DETAIL ACTIVE_OD WHERE ACTIVE_OD.ORD_NO = OB.ORD_NO AND ACTIVE_OD.ORD_DTL_STAT_CD NOT IN ('ORD_DTL_STAT_00', 'ORD_DTL_STAT_99') )

/* OrderMapper.getShopOrderAddressList: 쇼핑몰 주문서 배송지 목록 조회 */ SELECT CUST_NO , ADDRESS_NM , POST_NO , BASE_ADDRESS , DETAIL_ADDRESS , PHONE_NUMBER , RSV_NM , DEFAULT_YN FROM CUSTOMER_ADDRESS WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} ORDER BY CASE DEFAULT_YN WHEN 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC , REG_DT DESC , ADDRESS_NM ASC

/* OrderMapper.getShopOrderCustomerInfo: 쇼핑몰 주문 결제 기본 고객 정보 조회 */ SELECT CB.CUST_NO , CB.CUST_NM , CB.EMAIL , CB.PHONE_NUMBER , CB.CUST_GRADE_CD FROM CUSTOMER_BASE CB WHERE CB.CUST_NO = #{custNo} LIMIT 1

/* OrderMapper.getShopPaymentByPayNo: 쇼핑몰 결제번호 기준 결제 정보 조회 */ SELECT PAY_NO , ORD_NO , CUST_NO , PAY_STAT_CD , PAY_GB_CD , PAY_METHOD_CD , ORD_GB_CD , PG_GB_CD , ORG_PAY_NO , CLM_NO , PAY_AMT , APRV_AMT , CNL_AMT , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY_HASH , TRADE_NO , APPR_NO , RSP_CODE , RSP_MSG , BANK_CD , BANK_NO , VACT_HOLDER_NM , CASE WHEN VACT_DUE_DT IS NULL OR VACT_DUE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(VACT_DUE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS VACT_DUE_DT , CARD_CD , CARD_NO , DEVICE_GB_CD , DATE_FORMAT(REQ_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REQ_DT , CASE WHEN APPR_DT IS NULL OR APPR_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(APPR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS APPR_DT , CASE WHEN WEBHOOK_DT IS NULL OR WEBHOOK_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(WEBHOOK_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS WEBHOOK_DT , REQ_RAW_JSON , RSP_RAW_JSON , WEBHOOK_RAW_JSON FROM PAYMENT WHERE PAY_NO = #{payNo} LIMIT 1

/* OrderMapper.getShopPaymentByTossPaymentKeyHash: Toss 결제키 해시 기준 결제 정보 조회 */ SELECT PAY_NO , ORD_NO , CUST_NO , PAY_STAT_CD , PAY_GB_CD , PAY_METHOD_CD , ORD_GB_CD , PG_GB_CD , ORG_PAY_NO , CLM_NO , PAY_AMT , APRV_AMT , CNL_AMT , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY_HASH , TRADE_NO , APPR_NO , RSP_CODE , RSP_MSG , BANK_CD , BANK_NO , VACT_HOLDER_NM , CASE WHEN VACT_DUE_DT IS NULL OR VACT_DUE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(VACT_DUE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS VACT_DUE_DT , CARD_CD , CARD_NO , DEVICE_GB_CD , DATE_FORMAT(REQ_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REQ_DT , CASE WHEN APPR_DT IS NULL OR APPR_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(APPR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS APPR_DT , CASE WHEN WEBHOOK_DT IS NULL OR WEBHOOK_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(WEBHOOK_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS WEBHOOK_DT , REQ_RAW_JSON , RSP_RAW_JSON , WEBHOOK_RAW_JSON FROM PAYMENT WHERE TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY_HASH = #{tossPaymentKeyHash} LIMIT 1

/* OrderMapper.getShopPaymentByOrdNo: 주문번호 기준 결제 정보 조회 */ SELECT PAY_NO , ORD_NO , CUST_NO , PAY_STAT_CD , PAY_GB_CD , PAY_METHOD_CD , ORD_GB_CD , PG_GB_CD , ORG_PAY_NO , CLM_NO , PAY_AMT , APRV_AMT , CNL_AMT , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY_HASH , TRADE_NO , APPR_NO , RSP_CODE , RSP_MSG , BANK_CD , BANK_NO , VACT_HOLDER_NM , CASE WHEN VACT_DUE_DT IS NULL OR VACT_DUE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(VACT_DUE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS VACT_DUE_DT , CARD_CD , CARD_NO , DEVICE_GB_CD , DATE_FORMAT(REQ_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REQ_DT , CASE WHEN APPR_DT IS NULL OR APPR_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(APPR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS APPR_DT , CASE WHEN WEBHOOK_DT IS NULL OR WEBHOOK_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(WEBHOOK_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS WEBHOOK_DT , REQ_RAW_JSON , RSP_RAW_JSON , WEBHOOK_RAW_JSON FROM PAYMENT WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} ORDER BY PAY_NO DESC LIMIT 1

/* OrderMapper.getShopOrderPaymentForCancel: 주문취소 대상 원결제 정보 조회 */ SELECT PAY_NO , ORD_NO , CUST_NO , PAY_STAT_CD , PAY_GB_CD , PAY_METHOD_CD , ORD_GB_CD , PG_GB_CD , ORG_PAY_NO , CLM_NO , PAY_AMT , APRV_AMT , CNL_AMT , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY , TOSS_PAYMENT_KEY_HASH , TRADE_NO , APPR_NO , RSP_CODE , RSP_MSG , BANK_CD , BANK_NO , VACT_HOLDER_NM , CASE WHEN VACT_DUE_DT IS NULL OR VACT_DUE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(VACT_DUE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS VACT_DUE_DT , CARD_CD , CARD_NO , DEVICE_GB_CD , DATE_FORMAT(REQ_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REQ_DT , CASE WHEN APPR_DT IS NULL OR APPR_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(APPR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS APPR_DT , CASE WHEN WEBHOOK_DT IS NULL OR WEBHOOK_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(WEBHOOK_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS WEBHOOK_DT , REQ_RAW_JSON , RSP_RAW_JSON , WEBHOOK_RAW_JSON FROM PAYMENT WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND PAY_GB_CD = 'PAY_GB_01' AND PAY_STAT_CD IN ('PAY_STAT_02', 'PAY_STAT_01') ORDER BY PAY_NO DESC LIMIT 1

/* OrderMapper.getShopOrderCancelOrderBase: 주문취소 처리용 주문 마스터 정보 조회 */ SELECT ORD_NO , CUST_NO , ORD_STAT_CD , CASE WHEN ORDER_DT IS NULL OR ORDER_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(ORDER_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS ORDER_DT , CASE WHEN ORDER_CONFIRM_DT IS NULL OR ORDER_CONFIRM_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(ORDER_CONFIRM_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS ORDER_CONFIRM_DT , RCV_NM , RCV_POST_NO , RCV_ADDR_BASE , RCV_ADDR_DTL , DELV_CPN_NO , COALESCE(DELV_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS DELV_CPN_DC_AMT , COALESCE(ORD_DELV_AMT, 0) AS ORD_DELV_AMT , REFUND_BANK_CD , REFUND_BANK_NO , REFUND_HOLDER_NM , DEVICE_GB_CD FROM ORDER_BASE WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND ORD_NO = #{ordNo} LIMIT 1

/* OrderMapper.getShopAvailablePointBaseList: 고객의 사용 가능한 포인트 마스터 목록 조회 */ SELECT PNT_NO , CUST_NO , SAVE_AMT , USE_AMT , RMN_AMT , CASE WHEN EXPIRE_DT IS NULL OR EXPIRE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(EXPIRE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS EXPIRE_DT , DATE_FORMAT(SAVE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SAVE_DT , ORD_NO FROM CUSTOMER_POINT_BASE WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND RMN_AMT > 0 AND ( EXPIRE_DT IS NULL OR EXPIRE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' OR EXPIRE_DT >= NOW() ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN EXPIRE_DT IS NULL OR EXPIRE_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC , EXPIRE_DT ASC , SAVE_DT ASC , PNT_NO ASC

/* OrderMapper.getShopOrderPointDetailList: 주문번호 기준 포인트 사용 상세 이력 조회 */ SELECT PNT_NO , PNT_AMT , ORD_NO , BIGO FROM CUSTOMER_POINT_DETAIL WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND PNT_AMT < 0 ORDER BY PNT_NO ASC, REG_DT ASC

/* OrderMapper.getShopOrderPointDetailBalanceList: 주문번호 기준 포인트 사용/복구 누적 요약 조회 */ SELECT PNT_NO , ( SUM(CASE WHEN PNT_AMT < 0 THEN ABS(PNT_AMT) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN PNT_AMT > 0 THEN PNT_AMT ELSE 0 END) ) AS PNT_AMT , #{ordNo} AS ORD_NO , '' AS BIGO FROM CUSTOMER_POINT_DETAIL WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} GROUP BY PNT_NO HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN PNT_AMT < 0 THEN ABS(PNT_AMT) ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN PNT_AMT > 0 THEN PNT_AMT ELSE 0 END) ORDER BY PNT_NO ASC

/* OrderMapper.getShopOrderRestoreCartItemList: 주문번호 기준 장바구니 복구 대상 목록 조회 */ SELECT CUST_NO , GOODS_ID , SIZE_ID , ORD_QTY , EXHIBITION_NO FROM ORDER_DETAIL WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} ORDER BY ORD_DTL_NO ASC

/* OrderMapper.getShopMypageCancelHistoryItemByClmNo: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 취소상세 클레임 단건 조회 */ SELECT OCB.CLM_NO , OCB.ORD_NO , DATE_FORMAT(OCB.CHG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CHG_DT , OCB.CHG_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHG_STAT', OCB.CHG_STAT_CD) AS CHG_STAT_NM , COALESCE(OCB.PAY_DELV_AMT, 0) AS PAY_DELV_AMT , COALESCE(P.CNL_AMT, 0) AS REFUNDED_CASH_AMT FROM ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.CLM_NO = OCB.CLM_NO WHERE OCB.REG_NO = #{custNo} AND OCB.CLM_NO = #{clmNo} AND OCB.CHG_GB_CD = 'C'

/* OrderMapper.getShopMypageReturnHistoryList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 반품내역 클레임 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT OCB.CLM_NO , OCB.ORD_NO , DATE_FORMAT(OCB.CHG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CHG_DT , COALESCE(OCB.PAY_DELV_AMT, 0) AS PAY_DELV_AMT FROM ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB JOIN ORDER_CHANGE_DETAIL OCD ON OCD.CLM_NO = OCB.CLM_NO AND OCD.ORD_NO = OCB.ORD_NO WHERE OCB.REG_NO = #{custNo} AND OCB.CHG_GB_CD = 'R' AND COALESCE(OCB.CHG_STAT_CD, '') != 'CHG_STAT_02' AND COALESCE(OCD.CHG_DTL_STAT_CD, '') != 'CHG_DTL_STAT_19' AND DATE(OCB.CHG_DT) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(OCB.CHG_DT) <= #{endDate} ORDER BY OCB.CHG_DT DESC, OCB.CLM_NO DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* OrderMapper.getShopMypageReturnHistoryItemByClmNo: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 반품상세 클레임 단건 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT OCB.CLM_NO , OCB.ORD_NO , DATE_FORMAT(OCB.CHG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CHG_DT , COALESCE(OCB.PAY_DELV_AMT, 0) AS PAY_DELV_AMT FROM ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB JOIN ORDER_CHANGE_DETAIL OCD ON OCD.CLM_NO = OCB.CLM_NO AND OCD.ORD_NO = OCB.ORD_NO WHERE OCB.REG_NO = #{custNo} AND OCB.CLM_NO = #{clmNo} AND OCB.CHG_GB_CD = 'R' AND COALESCE(OCB.CHG_STAT_CD, '') != 'CHG_STAT_02' AND COALESCE(OCD.CHG_DTL_STAT_CD, '') != 'CHG_DTL_STAT_19' LIMIT 1

/* OrderMapper.getShopMypageReturnPickupAddress: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 반품상세 회수지 단건 조회 */ SELECT OCEA.ADDR_NAME AS RSV_NM , OCEA.ADDR_POST_NO AS POST_NO , OCEA.ADDR_BASE AS BASE_ADDRESS , OCEA.ADDR_DTL AS DETAIL_ADDRESS FROM ORDER_CHANGE_EXCHANGE_ADDRESS OCEA WHERE OCEA.CLM_NO = #{clmNo} AND OCEA.CLM_ADDR_GB_CD = 'CLM_ADDR_GB_01' ORDER BY OCEA.REG_DT DESC LIMIT 1

/* OrderMapper.getShopOrderReturnWithdrawTarget: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 반품 철회 대상 주문상품 1건 조회 */ SELECT OCB.CLM_NO , OCB.ORD_NO , OCD.ORD_DTL_NO , OCD.CHG_DTL_STAT_CD FROM ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB JOIN ORDER_CHANGE_DETAIL OCD ON OCD.CLM_NO = OCB.CLM_NO AND OCD.ORD_NO = OCB.ORD_NO WHERE OCB.REG_NO = #{custNo} AND OCB.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND OCB.CHG_GB_CD = 'R' AND COALESCE(OCB.CHG_STAT_CD, '') != 'CHG_STAT_02' AND OCD.ORD_DTL_NO = #{ordDtlNo} AND OCD.CHG_DTL_GB_CD = 'CHG_DTL_GB_02' AND COALESCE(OCD.CHG_DTL_STAT_CD, '') NOT IN ('CHG_DTL_STAT_14', 'CHG_DTL_STAT_19') ORDER BY COALESCE(OCB.CHG_DT, OCB.REG_DT) DESC , OCB.CLM_NO DESC , OCD.REG_DT DESC LIMIT 1

/* OrderMapper.getShopMypagePointItemList: 마이페이지 포인트 적립/차감 내역 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT CPD.PNT_NO , CPD.PNT_AMT , CPD.ORD_NO , CPD.BIGO , DATE_FORMAT(CPD.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS REG_DT FROM CUSTOMER_POINT_DETAIL CPD INNER JOIN CUSTOMER_POINT_BASE CPB ON CPB.PNT_NO = CPD.PNT_NO WHERE CPB.CUST_NO = #{custNo} ORDER BY CPD.REG_DT DESC, CPD.PNT_NO DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* OrderMapper.getShopMypageExpiringPointAmt: 마이페이지 7일 이내 만료 예정 포인트 합계 조회 */ SELECT COALESCE(SUM(RMN_AMT), 0) FROM CUSTOMER_POINT_BASE WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND RMN_AMT > 0 AND EXPIRE_DT IS NOT NULL AND EXPIRE_DT != '0000-00-00 00:00:00' AND EXPIRE_DT >= NOW() AND EXPIRE_DT < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

/* OrderMapper.getAdminOrderMaster: 관리자 주문 상세 마스터 정보 조회 */ SELECT OB.ORD_NO , DATE_FORMAT(OB.ORDER_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ORDER_DT , DATE_FORMAT(OB.ORDER_CONFIRM_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ORDER_CONFIRM_DT , CB.CUST_NM , CB.PHONE_NUMBER AS CUST_PHONE_NUMBER , CB.EMAIL AS CUST_EMAIL , OB.RCV_NM , OB.RCV_POST_NO , OB.RCV_ADDR_BASE , OB.RCV_ADDR_DTL , COALESCE(OB.ORD_DELV_AMT, 0) AS ORD_DELV_AMT , COALESCE(OB.DELV_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS DELV_CPN_DC_AMT FROM ORDER_BASE OB JOIN CUSTOMER_BASE CB ON CB.CUST_NO = OB.CUST_NO WHERE OB.ORD_NO = #{ordNo}

/* OrderMapper.getAdminOrderDetailList: 관리자 주문 상세 목록 조회 */ SELECT ORD_DTL_NO , ORD_DTL_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('ORD_DTL_STAT', ORD_DTL_STAT_CD) AS ORD_DTL_STAT_NM , CASE WHEN ORD_DTL_STAT_CD = 'ORD_DTL_STAT_06' AND COALESCE(RMN_QTY, ORD_QTY, 0) > 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ORDER_CHANGE_DETAIL OCD JOIN ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB ON OCB.CLM_NO = OCD.CLM_NO AND OCB.ORD_NO = OCD.ORD_NO WHERE OCD.ORD_NO = ORDER_DETAIL.ORD_NO AND OCD.ORD_DTL_NO = ORDER_DETAIL.ORD_DTL_NO AND COALESCE(OCB.CHG_STAT_CD, '') != 'CHG_STAT_02' AND COALESCE(OCD.CHG_DTL_STAT_CD, '') NOT IN ('CHG_DTL_STAT_02', 'CHG_DTL_STAT_14', 'CHG_DTL_STAT_33') ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS RETURN_APPLYABLE_YN , GOODS_ID , SIZE_ID , ORD_QTY , CNC_QTY , RMN_QTY , SUPPLY_AMT , (SALE_AMT + ADD_AMT) AS SALE_AMT , COALESCE(GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT , COALESCE(CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS CART_CPN_DC_AMT , COALESCE(POINT_USE_AMT, 0) AS POINT_USE_AMT , GREATEST( (SALE_AMT + ADD_AMT) * RMN_QTY - COALESCE(GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) - COALESCE(CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) - COALESCE(POINT_USE_AMT, 0), 0 ) AS FINAL_PAY_AMT FROM ORDER_DETAIL WHERE ORD_NO = #{ordNo} ORDER BY ORD_DTL_NO ASC

/* OrderMapper.getAdminOrderClaimList: 관리자 주문 상세 하단 클레임 목록 조회 */ SELECT CLAIM_ROW.CLM_NO , CLAIM_ROW.CHG_DTL_GB_CD , CLAIM_ROW.CHG_DTL_GB_NM , CLAIM_ROW.ORD_NO , CLAIM_ROW.ORD_DTL_NO , CLAIM_ROW.CHG_DTL_STAT_CD , CLAIM_ROW.CHG_DTL_STAT_NM , CLAIM_ROW.GOODS_ID , CLAIM_ROW.SIZE_ID , CLAIM_ROW.CHG_REASON_CD , CLAIM_ROW.CHG_REASON_NM , CLAIM_ROW.CHG_REASON_DTL , CLAIM_ROW.GOODS_NM , CLAIM_ROW.QTY , CLAIM_ROW.SALE_AMT , CLAIM_ROW.GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT , CLAIM_ROW.CART_CPN_DC_AMT , CLAIM_ROW.POINT_DC_AMT , CLAIM_ROW.ITEM_EXPECTED_REFUND_AMT + CASE WHEN CLAIM_ROW.CHG_GB_CD = 'R' AND CLAIM_ROW.FIRST_CLAIM_ROW_YN = 'Y' THEN COALESCE(CLAIM_ROW.PAY_DELV_AMT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS EXPECTED_REFUND_AMT FROM ( SELECT OCD.CLM_NO , OCD.CHG_DTL_GB_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHG_DTL_GB', OCD.CHG_DTL_GB_CD) AS CHG_DTL_GB_NM , OCD.ORD_NO , OCD.ORD_DTL_NO , OCD.CHG_DTL_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHG_DTL_STAT', OCD.CHG_DTL_STAT_CD) AS CHG_DTL_STAT_NM , OCD.GOODS_ID , OCD.SIZE_ID , OCD.CHG_REASON_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHG_REASON', OCD.CHG_REASON_CD) AS CHG_REASON_NM , OCD.CHG_REASON_DTL , GB.GOODS_NM , OCD.QTY , (OD.SALE_AMT + COALESCE(OCD.ADD_AMT, OD.ADD_AMT, 0)) AS SALE_AMT , COALESCE(OCD.GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT , COALESCE(OCD.CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) AS CART_CPN_DC_AMT , COALESCE(OCD.POINT_DC_AMT, 0) AS POINT_DC_AMT , OCB.CHG_GB_CD , COALESCE(OCB.PAY_DELV_AMT, 0) AS PAY_DELV_AMT , CASE WHEN OCD.ORD_DTL_NO = ( SELECT MIN(OCD_FIRST.ORD_DTL_NO) FROM ORDER_CHANGE_DETAIL OCD_FIRST WHERE OCD_FIRST.CLM_NO = OCD.CLM_NO ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FIRST_CLAIM_ROW_YN , GREATEST( ((OD.SALE_AMT + COALESCE(OCD.ADD_AMT, OD.ADD_AMT, 0)) * COALESCE(OCD.QTY, 0)) - COALESCE(OCD.GOODS_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) - COALESCE(OCD.CART_CPN_DC_AMT, 0) - COALESCE(OCD.POINT_DC_AMT, 0), 0 ) AS ITEM_EXPECTED_REFUND_AMT FROM ORDER_CHANGE_DETAIL OCD JOIN ORDER_CHANGE_BASE OCB ON OCB.CLM_NO = OCD.CLM_NO AND OCB.ORD_NO = OCD.ORD_NO LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON OD.ORD_NO = OCD.ORD_NO AND OD.ORD_DTL_NO = OCD.ORD_DTL_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = OCD.GOODS_ID WHERE OCD.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} ) CLAIM_ROW ORDER BY CLAIM_ROW.CLM_NO DESC, CLAIM_ROW.ORD_DTL_NO ASC

/* OrderMapper.getAdminOrderPaymentList: 관리자 주문 상세 하단 결제 목록 조회 */ SELECT P.ORD_NO , P.CLM_NO , P.PAY_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('PAY_STAT', P.PAY_STAT_CD) AS PAY_STAT_NM , P.PAY_METHOD_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('PAY_METHOD', P.PAY_METHOD_CD) AS PAY_METHOD_NM , P.PAY_AMT AS PAY_AMT , P.TRADE_NO , P.RSP_CODE , P.RSP_MSG , P.BANK_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('BANK', P.BANK_CD) AS BANK_NM , P.BANK_NO , OB.REFUND_BANK_CD , OB.REFUND_BANK_NO , CASE WHEN COALESCE(P.APPR_DT, P.WEBHOOK_DT, P.REQ_DT) IS NULL OR COALESCE(P.APPR_DT, P.WEBHOOK_DT, P.REQ_DT) = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(P.APPR_DT, P.WEBHOOK_DT, P.REQ_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS PROCESS_DT FROM PAYMENT P JOIN ORDER_BASE OB ON OB.ORD_NO = P.ORD_NO WHERE P.ORD_NO = #{ordNo} AND P.PAY_STAT_CD != 'PAY_STAT_00' ORDER BY COALESCE(P.APPR_DT, P.WEBHOOK_DT, P.REQ_DT) DESC, P.PAY_NO DESC
